skills.name: Rapid Ice
skills.description: Retreats and rapidly fires a frosted weapon at enemies in front.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies within a 12m front x 4m width

skills.name: Frost Penta Sword
skills.description: Explodes the cold energy of five connected weapons to attack nearby enemies.
